data.story_message:
First,
Josh tried their best to Repair Tha Barn but turned it into a 'do-it-yourself' disaster that'll be on HGTV's blooper reel. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Josh.
Due to after slipping on a rogue vegetable during lunch break, Josh became injured and will miss 0 matchday(s).
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Harvest tha Crops but accidentally harvested his own damn boot. Fucking dumbass. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Due to due to throwing out his back riding the mechanical bull at the local bar, Vrock became injured and will miss 0 matchday(s).
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure but the whole pile exploded in his face like a dirty prank from the universe. Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.
Due to because he tried to arm wrestle a gangster cow and lost, Jared became injured and will miss 0 matchday(s).

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Fix Tha Tractor but accidentally transformed it into an expensive paperweight. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Mow Tha Lawn but somehow turned the lawnmower into a runaway go-kart. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure but he failed. That's wasn't cowshit... that was BULLSHIT! Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Fix Tha Tractor but somehow made it worse, now it's a lawn ornament. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Milk Tha Cow but the cow said 'You better take me out for dinner first'. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Push Tha Car but it did not move an inch. Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Repair Tha Barn but turned it into a 'do-it-yourself' disaster that'll be on HGTV's blooper reel. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Harvest tha Crops and now the field looks like a diggity-darn masterpiece. The town declared it a holiday!
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure and successfully cleaned it all up. We could call him the scatman today thats for sure. The town declared it a holiday!

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Repair Tha Barn and made the place look like a palace. Now the Amish are sending him contracts. The cows mooed in approval!
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Milk Tha Cow but failed. If he can't milk the cow, I guess he has to leave the farm. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure but now it's a 'scent-sational' disaster! Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Build Tha Fence but ended up creating a luxury dog door for every farm animal...mission failed! Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but ran headfirst into a wall that was painted to look like a tunnel. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Lift Tha Hay but the haybales said 'nar nar'. Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Build Tha Fence and it worked. The lad sure knows his way around the wood. The town declared it a holiday!
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but ran headfirst into a wall that was painted to look like a tunnel. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Push Tha Car and defied physics, expectations, and his chiropractor's advice! The chickens laid eggs in celebration!

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Repair Tha Barn but failed. Someone call in the Amish like that one episode of Family Guy. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Chase Tha Coyote but the coyote hit him with a crate of dynamite. Classic Wile E. move. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure but the whole pile exploded in his face like a dirty prank from the universe. Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

Finally,

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

Josh tried their best to Build Tha Fence but it turned into a farm-wide invitation for every animal to go on an adventure. Vrock and Jared were both very disappointed in Josh.
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Harvest tha Crops but couldn't find the damn tractor. Josh and Jared were both very disappointed in Vrock.
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure but the whole pile exploded in his face like a dirty prank from the universe. Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.
Due to blowing out his fat wife's back, Jared became injured and will miss 0 matchday(s).

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!

First,
Josh tried their best to Build Tha Fence and nailed it, literally. Now he's going to nail his fat wife and maybe a chicken. The whole farm celebrated with a hamburger bubble-up meal!
Then,
Vrock tried their best to Milk Tha Cow and received gallons of milk. No more self-sucking! The town declared it a holiday!
Finally,
Jared tried their best to Shovel Tha Manure but his efforts belong in the same pile. Josh and Vrock were both very disappointed in Jared.

YeeeeeeHawww! That's all the news for this matchday. Stay tuned for more Farmington News! YEEEEEHAWWWW!
